requirements: directContext performs no durable writes and derives a stable invocation identity and per-item idempotency key from the exact OperationPayloadShape

preflightMediated atomically distinguishes new intent from replay using request key, Facet, pinned descriptor, exact single-or-batch shape, item count, order, and canonical raw inputs before W3 runs operation.before
invoke freezes the exact OperationPayloadShape, ordered rewritten inputs, and item-indexed W3 interceptor traces into one PreparedInvocation intent
invoke validates the opaque W2 authorization before approval, claim, EffectAttempt, and each effect boundary
invoke calls execute(itemIndex, context) only after write-ahead EffectAttempt evidence
invoke returns exactly one output per ordered input and durable evidence as FacetData
recordMediatedPresentation durably attributes request-, Facet-, descriptor-, shape-, and item-indexed operation.after interceptor traces to the returned invocation evidence
same OperationRequestKey and payload replay returns the original result without another effect
preflight replay returns the original final mediated result and rejects same-key changes without rerunning before or after interceptors
unknown effect outcome becomes indeterminate and never triggers an unrecorded retry
